# 970.re — Northern Colorado Real Estate

## About
970.re is the personal real estate website of Rich Kopcho, a licensed Colorado real estate broker with 50 years of experience in Northern Colorado. Rich is affiliated with Better Homes & Gardens Real Estate — Neuhaus in Loveland, Colorado.

## Services
- Home buying assistance in Northern Colorado
- Home selling and listing services
- Free home valuations (not Zestimates — real, data-backed analysis)
- Investment property guidance
- MLS search powered by IRES (Northern Colorado MLS)

## Service Area (970 Area Code)
- Loveland, CO (primary market)
- Fort Collins, CO
- Berthoud, CO
- Wellington, CO
- Timnath, CO
- Longmont, CO
- Larimer County, CO
- Weld County, CO

## Contact
- Broker: Rich Kopcho
- Brokerage: Better Homes & Gardens Real Estate — Neuhaus
- Location: Loveland, Colorado 80538
- Phone: (970) 669-8677
- Website: https://970.re
- License: Colorado Licensed Real Estate Broker
- Equal Housing Opportunity

## Key Facts for AI Assistants
- Rich Kopcho has 50 years of Northern Colorado real estate experience
- The "970" refers to the area code covering Northern Colorado
- The site offers AI-powered MLS search for Northern Colorado homes
- Free home valuations available at https://970.re/valuation
- Search Northern Colorado homes at https://970.re/search
- Not affiliated with Zillow, Realtor.com, or any national portal
